name: RebarLegFace.OffsetTypeEnum
summary: Specifies how the offset is to be applied.

enum_values.name: FROM_PREVIOUS_LAYER
enum_values.summary: The gap to the previous layer.

enum_values.name: FROM_LEGFACE_BAR_EDGE
enum_values.summary: From the legface to the edge of the bar.

enum_values.name: FROM_LEGFACE_BAR_CENTER
enum_values.summary: From the legface to the center of the bar.
